What We Offer

Our Services

Every package is performed with professional-grade products. Pricing varies based on vehicle size — contact us for an exact quote.

✦
Exterior Detail

A thorough hand wash, wheel cleaning, and tire dressing to restore your car's first impression.

Sedan $60  ·  SUV $60  ·  Truck/Van $70
  • Hand wash & rinse
  • Wheel & tire cleaning
  • Window clean (exterior)
  • Tire dressing
◈
Interior Detail

Deep cleaning inside the cabin — vacuuming, steam cleaning, and surface conditioning throughout.

Sedan $100  ·  SUV $120  ·  Truck/Van $130
  • Full vacuum (seats, floor, trunk)
  • Steam cleaning
  • Carpet shampoo
  • Dashboard & console wipe-down
  • Door panel & vent cleaning
  • Window clean (interior)
◉
Full Detail (Save $10)

The complete package — inside and out. Your best option for a thorough refresh or resale prep.

Sedan $150  ·  SUV $170  ·  Truck/Van $190
  • Everything in Exterior Detail
  • Everything in Interior Detail
  • Wax & paint protection
  • Air freshener finish
⬡
Add-Ons

Enhance any package with professional add-on services tailored to your vehicle's needs.

  • Claybar Treatment — $40
  • Engine Bay — $60
  • Seat Shampoo — $20
  • Pet Hair Removal — $20–$40
  • Headlight Restoration — $90

Book a Detail

Tell us about your vehicle and we'll get back to you quickly with availability and a firm quote.

We Come To You

We'll detail your car at your home or office — just need access to water and electricity on site. Let us know your address when booking and we'll confirm availability.
